Our Commodities

Five products, ready for export.

Why source through us

Trade you can document.

01

Origin you can trace

Every lot is tied to a sourcing region. We share harvest windows and aggregation points so you know where your cargo comes from.

02

Samples before you commit

Pre-shipment samples couriered on request. Inspect grade, moisture and color before you sign a contract.

03

Inspection-ready paperwork

Phytosanitary certificates, certificates of origin and SGS / pre-shipment inspection arranged at loading.

04

Flexible Incoterms

FOB Dar es Salaam as standard, CIF to your discharge port on request. Container or breakbulk.

Tell us what you need to import.

Send commodity, grade, quantity and destination port. We respond with a quote and lead time within two business days.

Product Catalogue · Origin Tanzania

Our Commodities

Five export-grade products, each fully specified and available FOB Dar es Salaam or CIF to your discharge port. Specs are typical; exact grades are confirmed against your contract, and samples are available on request.

SF-OIL

Sunflower Oil

Refined, bleached and deodorised (RBD) and crude grades. Light, neutral and high in vitamin E. Cold-pressed available for premium buyers.

GradesRefined (RBD) · Crude · Cold-pressed
Free fatty acid≤ 0.1% (refined)
Moisture≤ 0.1%
ColourLight golden, clear
PackingFlexitank (≈22 MT), 200 L drums, 1 L / 5 L PET bottles
Shelf life12–18 months
MOQ1 × 20ft container
Request a Quote →
CNUT

Cashew Nuts

Among the world's most sought-after cashews. Raw cashew nuts (RCN) for processors, and graded white wholes for buyers wanting finished kernels.

TypesRaw cashew nuts (RCN) · White wholes W240 / W320
Nut count (RCN)185–210 nuts/kg, outturn 48–54 lbs
Moisture≤ 8% (RCN) · ≤ 5% (kernels)
Broken / defective≤ 5% (kernels)
PackingJute bags 80 kg (RCN) · vacuum tins / cartons (kernels)
Harvest windowOctober – January
MOQ20 MT
Request a Quote →
SUG-45

ICUMSA 45 Sugar

Refined white cane sugar meeting the ICUMSA 45 standard — bright white, fine grain, suitable for direct consumption and food manufacturing.

StandardICUMSA 45 RBU
Polarisation≥ 99.8°
Moisture≤ 0.04%
ColourSparkling white, fine crystal
Packing50 kg PP bags · 1 MT jumbo bags
Loading25–27 MT per 20ft container
MOQ1 × 20ft container
Request a Quote →
SESM

Sesame Seeds

Natural white and mixed sesame seeds, machine-cleaned and sortexed. Hulled seed available for bakery and tahini buyers.

TypesNatural white · Mixed · Hulled (on request)
Purity98% · 99% · 99.95% (sortex)
Oil content48–52%
Moisture≤ 6%
FFA≤ 2%
Packing25 / 50 kg PP bags
MOQ20 MT

GARL

Garlic

Fresh whole garlic bulbs, hand-sorted by size. Firm, dry-skinned and shipped in ventilated packaging to protect through transit.

TypesSnow-white · Normal-white · Pure-white
Bulb size4.5 / 5.0 / 5.5 / 6.0 / 6.5 cm
Cloves per bulb8–12 typical
MoistureDry-cured, ≤ 65%

LoadingReefer container, 8–12 °C

About

Sourced at origin,
shipped with proof.

We connect Tanzania's farms and aggregators to buyers around the world — with the grading discipline and paperwork that international trade demands.

Tembo Agro Exports is a Tanzanian commodity exporter built around a simple idea: buyers should know exactly what they're getting, and where it came from, before the cargo leaves port.

Tanzania's soils and climate produce world-class sunflower, cashew, sesame and garlic, alongside refined sugar moving through the region. We aggregate from trusted growers and cooperatives, grade against international standards, and handle the logistics through the Port of Dar es Salaam.

We work with importers, processors, distributors and wholesalers — from single-container trial orders to recurring multi-container programmes. Whatever the size, the process is the same: clear specs, available samples, and inspection-ready documentation at loading.

How we work

Tell us the commodity, grade, quantity and destination. We confirm availability and lead time, courier a sample if you want one, and issue a contract with agreed Incoterms. At loading we arrange phytosanitary certificates, a certificate of origin, and independent pre-shipment inspection so what you ordered is what you receive.

SF-OIL · SESM

Central Tanzania

Singida & Dodoma — the heart of sunflower and sesame production.

CNUT

Southern Coast

Mtwara & Lindi — premium raw cashew nut belt.

GARL

Northern Highlands

Iringa & Njombe — cool highland garlic.

Export gateway

Dar es Salaam

Consolidation, inspection and loading at the main port.

Let's talk volumes.

Whether it's a trial container or a season-long programme, send your requirement and we'll come back with a quote.

RFQ · Request for Quotation

Request a Quote

Tell us the commodity, grade, quantity and destination. Submit and you'll get a reference code on the spot — we reply with pricing and lead time within two business days.

What we need to quote

The more you tell us up front, the faster and tighter the quote. Everything except the basics is optional.

IncotermsFOB Dar es Salaam (standard) or CIF to your discharge port.
SamplesPre-shipment samples couriered on request before contract.
DocsPhytosanitary, certificate of origin and SGS inspection arranged at loading.
Reply timeWithin 2 business days, including a reference code to track your request.

We use your details only to respond to this request. Fields marked * are required.
